summary.title: Summary
summary.liveUpdate: Budget updated: {currency} {committed} committed out of {planned} planned.
summary.autoCreatedAria: Item automatically created when confirming a booking

overcommit.title: Budget over-committed
overcommit.body: Committed amount exceeds planned. Review your items or increase your planned amounts.

empty.body: No budget items yet. You can start with an AI suggestion or add items manually.

addItem.title: Add budget item
addItem.description: Enter a label, an optional category and the planned amount.

field.label: Label
field.amountInvalid: Amount must be a non-negative number.

deleteItem.title: Delete budget item?
deleteItem.body: This will permanently delete “{label}”. This action cannot be undone.
